name: Mecha Phantom Beast Concoruda
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>コンコルーダ
desc:
1 Tuner + 1 or more non-Tuner monsters
Tokens you control cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects. If this card you control is destroyed by your opponent's card (either by battle or by card effect) and sent to your Graveyard: You can Tribute all Tokens you control, then target 1 Level 4 or lower "Mecha Phantom Beast" monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon that target.
mnst_eff:
1 Tuner + 1 or more non-Tuner monsters
Tokens you control cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects. If this card you control is destroyed by your opponent's card (either by battle or by card effect) and sent to your Graveyard: You can Tribute all Tokens you control, then target 1 Level 4 or lower "Mecha Phantom Beast" monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon that target.
eff:

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
